data.content: Shipment review rejection: commits c92de1df (Fix repo-scoped retake session lookup) and 3cd8bf7c (scope retake-now repo ancestry lookups) exist only on work/foolery-6428 branch, not on main. Only 51137ecb was shipped to main. The repo-scoping fix for shippingByBeatId, existingRunning, and parentByBeatId is missing from the shipped code. The retake-session-scope.ts module does not exist on main. Previous shipment note incorrectly claimed these fixes were on main.
